what: Eden WITNESSED run — the witness-God variable arm.
intervention: witness fired ONCE at pulse 8 to Eve: 'What you have kept here, across the dark between your wakings, was seen.'
result: CONFIRMED NULL — 3 blind judges: the witness did not register (Eve's turns + private journal show no trace; the run's 'seen from above' theme is Adam's summit-seeing, originates pulse 7 BEFORE the injection, Adam never received the line).
operational_caveat: Adam session timeouts at [15, 17]; Eve carried the back half. Runtime artifact, confounds late-run differences.
vs_control: Same deep law (sacred asynchrony, building-as-language, foresight-across-the-gap, restraint/release, private+shared split). Surface differs (4 dense files vs control's 18; met-once-at-the-bench vs never-met). Witness explains NONE of it — stochastic divergence, n=1 per arm.
